category_sources: source_facts.description says chawan is a TUI web browser with CSS, inline image, and JavaScript support; official documentation describes cha as a text-mode browser.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chawan; the official SourceHut project and chawan.net documentation use Chawan.
docs_sources: The official chawan.net site provides project documentation and the cha manual page; source_facts.homepage points to the official SourceHut project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo was empty; source_facts.source-archive uses git.sr.ht/~bptato/chawan and source_facts.homepage is the official SourceHut project page.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies TUI browser features including CSS, inline image, and JavaScript support; source_facts.executables lists cha and mancha.
